tasks.title: Queue script idempotency guards for complete/block transitions
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: harden `scripts/reliant-slice-queue.mjs` transition safety to avoid accidental complete/block on stale runtime IDs. Scope: additive guard checks + tests/docs. No product API/UI changes.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
